zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Molyneux於1302年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親James Moylnes33歲，母親Christian Drokenbrode28歲。她於1323年與Richard II Windsor of Stanwell在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Molyneux于1302年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾时，她的父亲James Moylnes33岁，母亲Christian Drokenbrode28岁。她于1323年与Richard II Windsor of Stanwell在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Molyneux was born in 1302, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Moylnes, was 33 and her mother, Christian Drokenbrode, was 28. She married Richard II Windsor of Stanwell in 1323, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1397, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Molyneux est née en 1302, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Moylnes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Christian Drokenbrode, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard II Windsor of Stanwell en 1323, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Molyneux 1302 in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Moylnes 33 und ihre Mutter Christian Drokenbrode 28. Sie hat 1323 in London, England Richard II Windsor of Stanwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1397 im Alter von 95 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Molyneux è nata il nel 1302 nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Moylnes, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Christian Drokenbrode, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard II Windsor of Stanwell nel 1323, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1397, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Molyneuxが1302年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父James Moylnesは33歳，母Christian Drokenbrodeは28歳であった。1323年にイギリスロンドンでRichard II Windsor of Stanwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Molyneux(이)가 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Moylnes(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Christian Drokenbrode(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1323년 영국 런던에서 Richard II Windsor of Stanwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bradenlove, Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, En: Wycombe, Buccingahamscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Molyneux nasceu em 1302, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Moylnes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Christian Drokenbrode, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard II Windsor of Stanwell em 1323, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1397, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Molyneux родилась в 1302 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Moylnes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Christian Drokenbrode, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard II Windsor of Stanwell в 1323 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1397 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Molyneux nació en 1302, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, James Moylnes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Christian Drokenbrode, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard II Windsor of Stanwell en 1323, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1397, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 95 años.
